text:
3. Other income
3.1 Details of income from investments (e.g. dividends, interest or rental income) received in the last
financial year (the year ended last 5th April), and your estimate of your income for the current
financial year. Indicate whether the income was paid gross or net of income tax. You are not
required to calculate any tax payable that may arise.
Nature of income and the Paid gross or net Income received in the Estimated income
asset from which it derived last financial year for the next 12
months
Estimated TOTAL investment income for the next 12 months: Total C £
3.2 Details of all state benefits (including state pension and child benefit) that you are currently
receiving.
Name of benefit Amount paid Frequency of payment Estimated income
for the next 12
months
Estimated TOTAL benefit income for the next 12 months: Total D £
3.3 Details of any other income not disclosed above.
INCLUDE:
Any source including a Pension (excluding State Pension), and Pension Protection Fund (PPF)
compensation
• from which income has been received during the last 12 months (even if it has now ceased)
• from which income is likely to be received during the next 12 months
You are reminded of your obligation to give full disclosure of your financial circumstances.
Nature of income Paid gross or Income received Estimated income
net in the last financial for the next 12
year months
Estimated TOTAL other income for the next 12 months: Total E £

metadata.title: Financial statement for a financial remedy in the family court or High Court: Form E1
metadata.description: Use this form only if you are applying for a financial remedy other than, for example, a financial order or financial relief after an overseas divorce or dissolution in the family court or High Court.
form_fields: Case No
